title: Esposa último modelo
writer: Ariel Cortazzo, Tito Insausti, Arnaldo Malfatti
actors: Mirtha Legrand, Ángel Magaña, Osvaldo Miranda
plot: When a young lady who knows nothing about housework falls in love with a handsome young man, her grandmother and governess help her look like an ideal housewife and an excellent match for marriage.
